message.content:
@startuml
participant "Client" as Client
participant "Device" as Device

note right of Client : Send UDP broadcast to port 56700\n tagged = 1
Client ->> Device : Lx::Protocol::Device::GetService

note left of Client : Register device service and port \n Future messages can be unicast datagrams 
Device --> Client : Lx::Protocol::Device::StateService 

note over Client #lightyellow: source = <unique 32bit id>\n ack_required = true\n sequence = <wrap around sequence>  
Client->>Device:Lx::Protocol::Device::SetLabel  

note over Device#lightgreen:source=<unique 32 bit ID from request >\ nsequence=<<sequencenumberfromrequest>>   
device-->client:l x :: protocol ::: devic e::::acknowledgement   

@enduml
